title: Create a Virtual Private Cloud, Route table, Internet Gateway, Nat Gateway
Project 1: Fullstack Ecommerce App Deploy on AWS
content: Architecture Overview 1. Create a Virtual Private Cloud, Route table, Internet Gateway, Nat Gateway 2. Create a Security groups for ALB, ECS Cluster, BastionHost, and Database 3. Create a Subnet Group, and RDS Postgres Engine 4. Create an Application Load Balancer, a Target group, and a Certificate Manager 5. Create an ECR, a Task Definitions, and an ECS Cluster 6. Deploy backend services 7. Migrations schema and seed data to postgres db 8. Create a DNS record to point an ALB using alias  9. Deploy frontend using S3 and CloudFront 10. Implement to authenticate GitHub Actions on AWS using OIDC Identity Provider 11. GitHub Actions CI/CD for backend services 12. GitHub Actions CI/CD for frontend 13. Create a DNS record to point a CloudFront using alias 14. Build Observability for an ECS Fargate

title: Create a Security groups for ALB, ECS Cluster, BastionHost, and Database
